# Signed: John Doe + model-123, 2023-03-15
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: A utility function for converting text to URL-safe slugs, used in a web application to generate clean URLs.
#
# Confidence: 0.9 - The regular expression used may not cover all edge cases for non-ASCII characters.
# Open: How to handle non-English characters that don't have a direct English equivalent?

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
